module multiplexer (
  input [1:0] sel,
  input [7:0] in0,
  input [7:0] in1,
  input [7:0] in2,
  input [7:0] in3,
  output reg [7:0] out);always @(*) begin
    case (sel)
        2'b00: out = in0;
        2'b01: out = in1;
        2'b10: out = in2;
        2'b11: out = in3;
        default: out = 8'b00000000;
    endcase
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
